nasb.text: for he said, “If Esau comes to the one company and attacks it, then the company which is left will escape.”

esv.text: thinking, “If Esau comes to the one camp and attacks it, then the camp that is left will escape.”

cnv.text: 心裡想：“即使以掃來擊殺這一隊，餘下的一隊還可以逃脫。”

ccb.text: 心想：“如果以扫来攻击一队，另一队还可以逃生。”

csbs.text: 他想：“如果以扫来击杀一队，剩下的一队还可以逃脱。”
